cases.prompt: 동시에 auth 기능이랑 billing 기능 두 개 작업하고 싶어. 어떻게 세팅해?

assertions.text: The agent proposes `git worktree add` commands for two directories (e.g., repo-auth and repo-billing) with corresponding feat/auth and feat/billing branches.
The agent mentions .env handling (symlink or per-worktree copy) and gitignore re-check.
